title: Morning Sync - Briefings
description: Morning briefing records generated by the Multi-Tool Morning Sync plugin. Created on first run via lazy initialization. Each row represents one morning sync with consolidated metrics across all configured sources.

Date.description: Briefing date in YYYY-MM-DD format — primary lookup key and page title.

Briefing.description: Link to the full briefing Notion page. The actual briefing content lives in a separate page; this field stores the page URL for quick access.

Email Count.description: Number of priority unread emails included in the briefing.

Meeting Count.description: Number of calendar events scheduled for today.

Task Count.description: Number of tasks due today or overdue from Notion.

Slack Highlights.description: Number of high-signal Slack messages surfaced (0 if Slack unavailable).

Drive Updates.description: Number of recently modified Drive documents surfaced (0 if Drive unavailable).

Sources Used.description: Which data sources successfully contributed to this briefing.

Overnight Window.description: Time window used for the sync, e.g. '12h' or 'since 2026-03-04 22:00'.

Generated At.description: Timestamp when the briefing was generated.

notes: Searched by name ('Morning Sync - Briefings') before creation. Lazy-created on first /morning:sync run. One row per day — duplicate dates are overwritten with the latest briefing. /morning:quick does NOT write to this database (ephemeral by design).
